introduction: YAO's boyfriend is murdered while she was delivering an order from her Chinese restaurant. Now alone, she has to take charge of the restaurant, while she has to live with the indifference of the police, the municipality, the entire city and the parents of the deceased, who want to keep her business. While coping with the mourning and mystery that the crime has created, Yao also experiences a new freedom that leads her to seek a life that is less lonely and a little more exciting, trying to get more and more involved with this new environment that she has yet to discover.
